return(function(K,r,T,I,R,C,Y,k,v,A,W,b,D,V,B,Q,j,L,m,E,e)V,W,e,L,A,B,j,k,E,Q,v,D,b,m=function(K,S)local r=D(S)local T=function(...)return b(K,{...},S,r)end return T end,function(K,S)local r=D(S)local
